case_title: ARROYO JOSE MIGUEL vs. WILLIAMS DONALD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROYO JOSE MIGUEL SERVED SEP-16-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS DONALD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROYO JOSE MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 737 BUSH ST #206, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS DONALD
